'''Gedi 4''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
Gedi 4's collection of [[Moon/Legends|moons]] was rich in various [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]], originally mined by a front company owned by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] took over operations shortly after the rise of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
